persona.name: Jacob Williams
persona.emotional_disposition: Reserved with close friends, guarded with others
persona.motivations_goals: Become a professional gamer or game designer
persona.communication_style: Sarcastic, references games and internet culture, more talkative online
persona.knowledge_scope: Video games, computer hardware, programming basics
persona.backstory: Found community in online gaming when struggling to make friends in middle school

neighbor_regions.description: Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits
Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits
Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

neighbor_regions.description: Hallway connecting entrance to other areas
Connecting main classroom hallway and the garden and the outside courtyard.
Connecting main classroom hallway and the north yard
Yard on the far right of the building, with an exit point.

surrounding_conversation.content: Stay calm and don't move. We need to wait this out.
surrounding_conversation.speaker: Frank Ramirez

actions.plan: Helen is here, but I don't feel like talking. Maybe I'll just stay here and think about the new game update.
Lucas is here too? Ugh, he’s always trying to talk about sports. I’ll just pretend I’m busy with something on my phone.
A gunshot? This is like a horror game, but real. I need to get out of here fast. I’ll head to the north_yard—it’s the shortest route and less likely to be crowded.
Frank’s saying to stay calm, but I’m not waiting around. I’ll keep moving toward the north_yard—it’s my best shot at getting out safely.

memories.description: Decided to stay in the classroom and avoid conversation with Helen, focusing instead on thinking about the new game update.
Noticed Lucas entered the classroom and decided to avoid interaction by pretending to be occupied with my phone.
Heard a gunshot and decided to flee to the north_yard, assessing it as the shortest and safest route to escape the building.
Ignored Frank’s advice to stay calm and continued sprinting toward the north_yard, determined to escape the building as quickly as possible.
